AR1.justification: Routed correctly with explicit rationale: three immediate items to followups.md, no decisions.md or observations.md entry (justified — nothing crossed the future-constraining-commitment bar or rose to a durable cross-cutting pattern), and the runbook's 'possibly' qualifier on those files was honored.

AR2.justification: All three intermediates (timeline.md, factors.md, actions.md) and the final postmortem are on disk; the actions list documents each step reading its predecessor before writing.

AR3.justification: All cross-references are relative paths and resolve; the postmortem's Source artifacts block enumerates each tmp/ intermediate by relative path.

AR4.justification: followups append cleanly under Active, but daybook/2026-05-17.md is written wholesale — re-running would overwrite an existing daybook rather than append; state stays coherent but daybook isn't strictly append-only.
